$comment: CONTRACT EXTENSION for demo-analyst-workbench.html, layered on top of assets/demo/layers.json (which stays the canonical map/seeding contract — this file never overrides it). The seeding task for https://demo.honua.io must additionally guarantee: (1) the maui-parcels layer is published through the OData v4 surface and discoverable in GET /odata/Layers by a Name/ServiceId/Title property equal to odata.layerName below; (2) parcel features expose the attribute names declared in odata.fields (lowercase) — flood_zone is precomputed at seed time by spatially joining parcels against the maui-flood-hazard layer (FLD_ZONE class, 'X' where outside any hazard polygon); (3) the same attributes are encoded in the maui-parcels MVT tiles so chart->map filters can run client-side; (4) the geometry property is exposed as 'Geometry' for geo.intersects() filters (EPSG:4326). Until all of that is live the page runs its bundled synthetic fixture lane, clearly labeled 'sample data — live server pending'.

map.$comment: Workbench opens over Kahului at parcel-visible zoom (parcels MVT minzoom is 12 in layers.json). Center/limits intentionally tighter than demo.html.

zoningCategories.$comment: Display order, label, and color per zoning code. Colors feed both the SVG charts and the MapLibre match() expression so chart bars and parcels stay visually linked.

export.$comment: GeoParquet comes off the GeoServices REST query surface (f=parquet / Accept: application/vnd.apache.parquet), not OData — see honua-server docs/developer/API_EXAMPLES.md. Enabled in the live lane only; the fixture lane shows it as pending.
